creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

since last upgrade to claws-mail-3.14.1, next button skips to next message once, but doesn't automatically display it in preview window. Consequent clicks on next button do nothing.

Any idea how to make this work again?

This is on 11.0-RELEASE-p3 amd64, claws-mail is compiled in poudriere, where both host and jail are on 11.0-RELEASE-p3 amd64. Options are default except for docs:

Options        :
	COMPFACE       : on
	DEBUG          : off
	DOCS           : off
	ENCHANT        : on
	IPV6           : on
	JPILOT         : off
	LDAP           : off
	MANUAL         : on
	NLS            : on
	STARTUP        : on
	THEMES         : on
